{{nihongo|'''Nishikamo Shrine'''|西鴨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Nishikamo Shrine | native_name = 西鴨神社 | image = 西鴨神社 拝殿.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Nishikamo Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.306212|133.910438}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Nishikamo Shrine'''|西鴨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nishikamo Shrine'''|西鴨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Nishikamo Shrine | native_name = 西鴨神社 | image = 西鴨神社 拝殿.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Nishikamo Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.306212|133.910438}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Nishikamo Shrine'''|西鴨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nishikamo Shrine'''|西鴨神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]].
